response.overview: TAKANAKA SUPER BEST LIVE 2023 ULTRASEVEN-T is a spectacular concert celebrating the 70th birthday and career of legendary Japanese guitarist Masayoshi Takanaka. Recorded on September 30, 2023, at the Hibiya Open-Air Concert Hall in Tokyo, it features his greatest hits. This career-spanning performance acts as an "All Time Best" celebration, pulling from his time with the Sadistic Mika Band up to his massive solo hits.
response.title: Takanaka: Super Best Live 2023 ULTRASEVEN-T
